Comment: athenafarm — tract/farm producer year ETL pipeline. Parallel ingest of SSS + PG reference + PG CDC tables, followed by Spark DataFrame full-load transforms and optional RDS sync. All infrastructure values substituted at deploy time.

IngestParallel.Comment: Run all three ingest jobs concurrently — SSS source tables, PG reference tables, and PG CDC target snapshots.

StartSSSCrawler.Comment: Start the SSS Farmrecords Glue crawler to refresh the sss-farmrecords catalog database from S3 landing zone. If already running from a concurrent execution, skip straight to the poll loop.

Catch.Comment: Crawler already running — skip the start and fall into the poll loop.

WaitForSSSCrawler.Comment: Poll every 30 seconds until the crawler reaches READY state.

GetSSSCrawlerState.Comment: Read current crawler state. READY = finished (success or failure). Any other value = still running.

CheckSSSCrawlerDone.Comment: Branch on crawler State. READY means finished — check LastCrawl.Status separately in IngestSSS logs. Anything else means still running.

CheckSSSCrawlerStatus.Comment: Crawler is READY. Check LastCrawl.Status — FAILED means no catalog tables were updated and IngestSSS would read stale/missing data.

IngestSSSFailed.Cause: SSS crawler or IngestSSS Glue job failed

TransformParallel.Comment: Run tract and farm producer year transforms concurrently. Both read from S3 Iceberg only (no shared write targets, no locks).

SelectTransformTractPath.Comment: Default to single_fast tract transform; allow explicit fallback to legacy staged chain when requested.

TransformTractProducerYearSingleFast.Comment: Run tract single_fast stage (single-pass in-memory transform + direct publish) with highest DPU profile (G.2X x 40) (TimeoutSeconds=3600, --max_job_seconds=0).

TransformTractProducerYearPreprocessSpin.Comment: Run tract preprocess spine stage (ibsp projection/normalization) with highest DPU profile (G.2X x 40) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).

TransformTractProducerYearPreprocessStru.Comment: Run tract preprocess structure-link stage (spine+ibst) with balanced DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-filter stage (structure_link key-filter + ibib projection) with highest DPU profile (G.2X x 40) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b0 stage (hex bucket 0) with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b1 stage (hex bucket 1) with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b2 stage (hex bucket 2) with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b3 shard s0 stage with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b3 shard s1 stage with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b3 shard s2 stage with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b3 shard s3 stage with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b4 stage (hex bucket 4) with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b5 stage (hex bucket 5) with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b6 stage (hex bucket 6) with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b7 stage (hex bucket 7) with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b8 stage (hex bucket 8) with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b9 stage (hex bucket 9) with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b10 stage (hex bucket 10) with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b11 stage (hex bucket 11) with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b12 stage (hex bucket 12) with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b13 stage (hex bucket 13) with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b14 stage (hex bucket 14) with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure-farm-b15 stage (hex bucket 15) with high DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess structure merge stage (union b0..b15 into consolidated structure stage) with balanced DPU profile (G.2X x 16) (TimeoutSeconds=1020, --max_job_seconds=900).

TransformTractProducerYearPreprocessCore.Comment: Run tract preprocess core2-extract stage (ibin key projection/materialization) with high DPU profile (G.2X x 32) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).
Run tract preprocess core2 stage (structure_farm+core2_extract) with high DPU profile (G.2X x 32) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).

TransformTractProducerYearPreprocessPart.Comment: Run tract preprocess partner stage (core2+ibpart+crmd_partner) with balanced DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).

TransformTractProducerYearPreprocessEnri.Comment: Run tract preprocess enrich stage to materialise tract_current stage table with balanced DPU profile (G.2X x 24) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).

TransformTractProducerYearFinalizeResolv.Comment: Run tract finalize resolve stage with moderate DPU profile (G.2X x 16) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=1020).

TransformTractProducerYearFinalizePublis.Comment: Run tract finalize publish stage to write final snapshot with moderate DPU profile (G.2X x 12) (TimeoutSeconds=1140, --max_job_seconds=900).

TransformFarmProducerYear.Comment: Run the farm-level DataFrame transform and write a full-load snapshot to farm_producer_year.

CheckSkipRDSSync.Comment: Only run SyncToRDS if skip_rds_sync is explicitly false. Default (absent or true) skips the sync.

SyncToRDS.Comment: Sync the Iceberg delta rows back to the authoritative RDS PostgreSQL instance.

Notify.Comment: Publish pipeline completion/failure notification via SNS Lambda. Passes the full execution state so the Lambda can report whatever fields are present regardless of which stage failed.
